findings.evidence: `rg -n "ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup|deprecated" code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/DedekindDomain/RamificationInertia.lean` shows the current signature at lines 32-35 ends with `(P : Ideal A) [P.IsMaximal] :` and no deprecation wrapper; the PR diff shows `(hP : P ≠ ⊥)` was removed.
findings.fix: Keep the old argument in the public theorem signature and ignore it, or move the new signature to a new name and provide a `@[deprecated]` compatibility wrapper dated appropriately.
findings.issue: Public theorem `TauCeti.DedekindDomain.ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup` dropped the explicit `(hP : P ≠ ⊥)` argument, changing existing downstream calls with no compatibility path.

summary: The Mathlib bump adaptation silently changes the callable API of a public TauCeti theorem by dropping an explicit hypothesis argument. That breaks downstream positional uses without a deprecation path.
